abstract: Schema example for a candidate AI research paper metadata record. This committed row is not a successful arXiv discovery result and should be replaced by running the discovery script when arXiv metadata access succeeds.
review_notes: Schema/example sample only. Re-run scripts/phase2/discover_research_ai_papers.py --discover to create real arXiv metadata candidates.
title: Schema Example: LLM Inference Serving Candidate Metadata
